steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
To find the intersection, set the two expressions for y equal: $$4x+7 = 5x-3$$.
Subtract $4x$ from both sides: $$7 = x-3$$.
Add 3 to both sides: $$x = 10$$.

steps.title: Find the y-coordinate
steps.content:
Substitute $x=10$ into either original equation; using $y=4x+7$ gives $$y = 4(10)+7 = 40+7 = 47$$.
Thus the intersection point is $(10,47)$.
That confirms C is correct.
